actionUnits.condition: Manually invoke public no-arg methods on PrefabInstance(id=543585960) under Models(fileID=1472401654) to cover both SoundPlayer.PlaySound() and SpawnPaper.spawn(). Scene MonoBehaviour settings map exactly: SpawnPaper (script_fileID=698430408, guid=c3441e8102712e94eb08515cc7e18fb8) has clip(guid=5bf50410f355a654e91279204bd96587), paperToSpawn(fileID=8817731074829524137, name=Paper), position(fileID=1038081565). SoundPlayer (script_fileID=698430411, guid=71e616354a0b0cd47a7526ce46ba3eaf) has source(fileID=2093747358), sound(guid=5bf50410f355a654e91279204bd96587). Expectation: PlaySound assigns AudioSource.clip then plays; SpawnPaper.spawn starts coroutine and, after clip.length seconds, Instantiate(Paper) at position transform.

Toggle PC twice to cover both StartPC() and ShutDownPC() branches in RunPC. Scene MonoBehaviour settings map exactly: RunPC (script_fileID=759145567, guid=d40707984c8c8654a8e7422e0d85449f) has canvas(fileID=1480975538), source(fileID=1768927072), StartSound(guid=c7ed05b156a403a42b5d91316854e42d), EndSound(guid=33e37c2c5603b534a84188086a3b9147). First TogglePC should enable canvas and play StartSound; second TogglePC should disable canvas and play EndSound.
